title: triorchis odoratus
intro: Triorchis odoratus, also known as the "Three-horned orchid", is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Triorchis odoratus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating fever and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Triorchis odoratus are typically made by infusing the plant in hot water to create a tea or by extracting its active compounds to create a tincture.
